label: Trim video
description: Trim a video at the beginning, end, or both based on time. Uses the existing video-combiner (canvas + MediaRecorder). Output is a WebM data URL saved to a row variable. Optional: queue save to project folder.

formSchema.label: Run only if (row variable; skip when empty/falsy)
Video URL override (optional; use {{mainVideo}} for row value)
End time (seconds; omit for rest of video)
Also queue save to project (folder name; empty = skip)
Filename when saving (optional; use {{title}} for row value; .webm added if no extension)
Project ID for save (when saveToProject set; use {{projectId}})
